title: Pre-War Auto-Injector
description: A military auto-injector, its glass barrel sloshing with something that glows a sickly amber. One dose of pre-war combat serum — guaranteed to make you hit harder, and flinch at every shadow after.

options.text: Jam it in — feel the burn (+1 Strength, permanent)
options.result: Fire roars up your arm and your muscles sing — you're stronger, lastingly so. But your heart won't slow, and every noise jolts you half out of your skin.
You grind the injector into the dirt. Whatever edge it offered, the price reads too steep.
